title: Smoky Cauliflower Gratin
description: A delicious and comforting side dish, smoky cauliflower gratin is a twist on the classic recipe, featuring smoky flavors from British bacon.
instructions: In a large saucepan of boiling water, blanch cauliflower florets for 3-5 minutes, until slightly tender.
In a large skillet, cook smoky bacon over medium heat until crispy, then chop into pieces.
In a separate saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in cream and grated cheese until smooth and well combined.

In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange a layer of cauliflower, followed by a layer of bacon, and a layer of cheese sauce. Repeat this process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Season with black pepper to taste, then sprinkle with chopped parsley if desired.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown and bubbly.
